compiled_state.title: Implement the LangflowRunner REST client (currently a stub)
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Wire the stubbed `LangflowRunner` to a real hosted Langflow deployment so the
framework runs in environments that prefer Langflow over the in-process runner.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] POST /api/v1/run/{flow_id} with `x-api-key`, body `{input_value, input_type:chat, output_type:chat}`
- [ ] Defensive extraction of the deeply-nested response message
- [ ] Maps Langflow output to the `review_result` findings contract
- [ ] Configurable via LANGFLOW_URL/LANGFLOW_API_KEY; clear error when unset
- [ ] Tests against a recorded/fake Langflow response (offline)

comments.body: Implemented: LangflowRunner now calls POST {LANGFLOW_URL}/api/v1/run/{LANGFLOW_FLOW_ID} (x-api-key, input_value chat in/out) via stdlib urllib, extracts the findings JSON from Langflows nested response (defensive walk + recursive fallback, tolerates json fences/bare list), and runs it through the shared normalize/validate/citation pipeline. Tests: pure extract/parse helpers + mocked end-to-end + missing-config error. Default review runner unchanged (langgraph).
comments.author: Claude
